---
title: "elective courses"
format: html
---

# List of elective courses

During the course of your PhD study programme, you are required to complete PhD courses or similar subject elements totalling approximately 30 ECTS credits

Kursusadmin: 
Johanne: 9352-2205
tilde: 2087-0344

## Interessante kurser 2026 [22 ECTS]

How to secure funding for your research [0,8 ECTS]
22 April 2026 08:00 - 15:30

Epidemiology II: [4,2 ECTS] - Fall

Clinical Research [2,1 ECTS]
08 June 2026 08:30 - 15:30
09 June 2026 08:30 - 15:30
10 June 2026 08:30 - 15:30

Qualitative data analysis: Using NVivo: [4,8 ECTS] - Fall





## 2025 Q3: [0 ECTS]; 

(Waitling list) 
How to secure funding for your research [0,8 ECTS]
07 November 2025 08:00 - 15:30

(Waitling list) 
Health - Welcome to the PhD study [0,5 ECTS]
13 November 2025 09:00 - 14:00

(Waitling list) 
Epidemiology I - Basic Principles of Epidemiology - [2,5 ECTS] - Fall
18 November 2025 08:30 - 15:30
19 November 2025 08:30 - 15:30
20 November 2025 08:30 - 15:30
21 November 2025 08:30 - 15:30

(Waitling list) 
Artificial intelligence for scientific writing [1,5 ECTS]


## 2026 Q1 og Q2 [9,7 ECTS]

Developing complex interventions in Public Health [2,4 ECTS] - Spring
07 January 2026 09:00 - 16:00
08 January 2026 09:00 - 16:00
09 January 2026 09:00 - 16:00

Basic Biostatistics - part 1: [2,4 ECTS]
14 January 2026 09:15 - 16:00
21 January 2026 09:15 - 16:00
28 January 2026 09:15 - 16:00
04 February 2026 09:15 - 16:00

Evaluating complex interventions in Public Health [2,4]
18 March 2026 09:00 - 16:00
19 March 2026 09:00 - 16:00
20 March 2026 09:00 - 16:00

Responsible Conduct of Research [1 ECTS]
09 April 2026 08:15 - 12:45
15 April 2026 08:15 - 12:45

Course Become a productive and joyful researcher [1,5 ECST]

Clinical Research [2,1]
08 June 2026 08:30 - 15:30
09 June 2026 08:30 - 15:30
10 June 2026 08:30 - 15:30

## 2026 Q3 og Q4 [8,1 ECTS]

Introduction to register-based research [3,5 ECTS]
03 November 2026 09:00 - 15:30
04 November 2026 09:00 - 15:30
09 November 2026 09:00 - 15:30
10 November 2026 09:00 - 15:30
11 November 2026 09:00 - 15:30

Measuring socioeconomic position in epidemiological and clinical research [ECTS 2]
24 November 2026 09:00 - 15:30
25 November 2026 09:00 - 15:30
26 November 2026 09:00 - 15:30

(Waiting list)
Advanced R




Introduction to managing Research Data, FAIR principles, and Data search [0,3 ECTS]
11 November 2025 09:00 - 12:00
